_comment: Content images uploaded to Shopify Files (CDN) by scripts/provision-cms.mjs so the content team can pick/swap them in the Theme Editor. These mirror the theme-asset fallbacks already shipped in the sections, so nothing changes visually until someone picks a Files image. Alt text is authored in EN; localize per language in Translate & Adapt (Content → Files). Keep filenames in sync with assets/.

files.used_by: hero section (image setting), Product schema, Open Graph
